name: Gemma 3n
tagline: Mobile-first efficient variant (E2B, E4B) for on-device use.
metaDescription: Gemma 3n (Google), released 2025-06-26 — part of the Gemma (open weights) line. Mobile-first efficient variant (E2B, E4B) for on-device use.
overview: Gemma 3n is a large language model from Google, part of the Gemma (open weights) line. Released 2025-06-26. Google's family of open-weight models derived from Gemini research, for local and commercial use.
What's notable in this version: Mobile-first efficient variant (E2B, E4B) for on-device use.
